items.name_cn:
🆕 Style: M12587 With variable code chip
 This small Montsouris backpack features shiny calfskin with Monogram details, subtly expressing the LV Vibe series identity. The Road Heritage buckle and leather drawstring add functional design, while the distinctive metal hardware makes a finishing touch. The front zip pocket keeps small items secure.
 28 x 30 x 18 cm
(L x H x W)

items.name_en: New Tote Bag🎉2VG119🎉🎉
items.name_cn:
New Tote Bag🎉2VG119🎉🎉
This tote bag features a distinct architectural silhouette defined by geometric lines, cleverly combining aesthetics with functionality. Large capacity design with a woven handle, featuring two large practical side pockets. The practical Re-Nylon body is accented with leather details and a painted enamel triangular metal logo. Lightweight and practical. Guys, grab one now🎉🎉
31.5x42x17cm🎉🎉🎉👏👏👏

items.name_en: 🆕 Upgraded Version⚠️ M14194 Black & Color! Collaboration Takashi Murakami! Nano Diane Baguette. The Nano Diane in Monogram Empreinte leather is a miniaturized version of the iconic Diane bag. This meticulously crafted piece features all key details of the original design, including a round flap, piped edges, and strap-style magnetic closure. Its removable handle and detachable adjustable shoulder strap offer different carrying options.
